response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows systems, domain expertise in fixed income or investment banking, and has no documented experience with SQL Server or Oracle. While the resume shows strong general software development skills and leadership in other domains, it does not align with the core technical or domain requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and platforms
Proven leadership and mentorship in software engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD)
Strong communication skills and experience in open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated C++ experience on Windows systems (only C/C++ in embedded/IDE contexts)
Lacks domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking
No experience with SQL Server or Oracle; only MongoDB and MySQL mentioned

key_factors.factor: Fixed Income or Capital Markets domain expertise
